title: Date range filter missing — only season (year) filter implemented
evidence: main.go:55 matches_by_team tool accepts 'season' (integer) but has no start_date/end_date params; soccer/query.go:83 MatchesBySeason filters by year only, no date range function exists
suggestion: Add start_date and end_date parameters to matches_by_team tool and implement a MatchesByDateRange query function

title: dataDir helper conditionally skips 11 data-dependent tests when data directory absent
evidence: soccer/soccer_test.go:17 t.Skipf("data dir not available: %v", err) — used by loadDB() which is called by 11 of 13 tests
suggestion: Embed minimal test fixtures or use testdata/ directory so tests don't skip in CI

title: TestFormatMatches conditionally skips when no matches found
suggestion: Use hardcoded Match structs instead of depending on loaded data

title: No MCP protocol integration tests for JSON-RPC handler
evidence: main.go:209-241 handle() and main.go:243-263 serve() have zero test coverage; only the soccer/ package is tested
suggestion: Add integration tests for initialize, tools/list, and tools/call JSON-RPC methods

title: go.mod specifies non-existent Go version 1.25.4
evidence: go.mod:3 'go 1.25.4' — Go 1.25 is not a released version as of the evaluation date
suggestion: Use a released Go version (e.g. 1.22 or 1.23)
